calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR#3058. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to William Jemmott, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-02-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Patrick Macias, Esq., for Plaintiff Deborah Haberman.
David Bremer, Esq., for Defendants/Cross Plaintiffs Jessica Hock and Joanne Blackburn.
Deanne J. Broglio, Esq., for Defendant Nina Frank.
William Jemmott, Esq., for Defendant Comp USA and Eric Samson.
02:30 p.m. - Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Total settlement in the amount of $115,000.00 jointly by the defendants, each to bears own costs and fees. Funding within 20 days, Cross Complaint to be dismissed, settlement to be reduced in writting and released to be prepare by Ms. Broglio and forward to Mr. Macias for signature. All agreed to terms and counsels are authorized to settle.
Matter is placed on CRC 225 calendar on March 2, 2004 at 10 am. in Dept. 212 for dismissal.
Trial is vacated.
